title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Co-scientist is a Google AI system that automates medical discovery by identifying novel drug candidates and treatments for cancer, leukemia, antibiotic resistance, vision loss, and liver fibrosis. The system uses self-ranking mechanisms and consensus to outperform human expert researchers in identifying breakthrough treatments.
